summary: Verified ADR 0106 from the integrated mainline branch by confirming the mirrored worker-checkout Proxmox credential payload, replaying the managed Windmill schedule updates, repairing the worker sandbox write path for reaper receipts, and recording a fresh clean `ephemeral_vm_reaper` sweep receipt under the worker-local `.local/fixtures/reaper-runs/` path on docker-runtime-lv3.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_fixture_manager.py tests/test_ephemeral_vm_reaper.py tests/test_fixture_expiry_reaper.py tests/test_ephemeral_lifecycle_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_deadlock_repo_surfaces.py -q` passed with `29 passed` from the integrated mainline worktree.

`make syntax-check-windmill`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` all passed from the integrated mainline worktree.

verification.check: Integrated Windmill converge plus targeted ADR 0106 refresh
verification.observed: The integrated `playbooks/windmill.yml` replay completed worker checkout sync, mirrored `/srv/platform_server/.local/proxmox-api/lv3-automation-primary.json`, refreshed runtime secrets, restarted Windmill, and synced repo-managed scripts before later failing in unrelated raw-app sync for `f/lv3/operator_access_admin` with Docker reporting `unexpected EOF`. The final ADR 0106 reapply therefore used a targeted worker-checkout refresh plus a targeted sync of `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper`.
A direct controller-side replay of the repo-managed Windmill schedule update loop returned HTTP 200 for every existing schedule, including `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper_every_30m`.

verification.check: Live Windmill script, schedule, and healthcheck
verification.observed: The Windmill API returned HTTP 200 for `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper` at hash `a2eed27d62fa68fc`, `GET /api/w/lv3/schedules/get/f%2Flv3%2Fephemeral_vm_reaper_every_30m` reported `enabled=true`, `schedule="0 */30 * * * *"`, `timezone="Europe/Bucharest"`, and `script_path="f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper"`, and `f/lv3/windmill_healthcheck` returned HTTP 200 with probe `adr-0106-main-merge`.

verification.check: Manual live reaper sweep and guest receipt
verification.observed: A controller-side `run_wait_result` POST to `http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fephemeral_vm_reaper` returned HTTP 200 with `{"run_at":"2026-03-26T17:05:54.633829Z","warned_vmids":[],"expired_vmids":[],"skipped_vmids":[],"retagged_vmids":[]}`, and guest verification through the inventory-driven Ansible jump path confirmed the mirrored token payload plus receipt `/srv/platform_server/.local/fixtures/reaper-runs/reaper-run-20260326T170554Z.json`.

notes: The first verified ADR 0106 live path was proven earlier on 2026-03-26 from `codex/ws-0106-live-apply`; this receipt records the follow-up verification from the integrated mainline release path.

The broader Windmill playbook still has a late raw-app sync issue outside ADR 0106 itself: `f/lv3/operator_access_admin` failed with Docker `unexpected EOF` after the script-sync stage. The ADR 0106 script, schedule, healthcheck, mirrored worker credential payload, and manual reaper run all succeeded from the same integrated branch state after the targeted worker-checkout refresh and one-script sync.

The production platform version advances to `0.130.22` with this rebased mainline claim, while ADR metadata continues to note `0.130.20` as the first platform-version label present when the capability became true on the live host.
